features.name: Project scaffold & verification baseline
features.description: Next.js (App Router) + TypeScript project with ESLint/Prettier + Vitest; package.json scripts (typecheck, lint, test, build); ./init.sh runs green from a clean checkout.
features.evidence: Scaffolded Next.js 16.2.9 + React 19.2.4 (App Router, TS, Tailwind v4, no src/) at repo root via create-next-app. Added scripts typecheck (tsc --noEmit), lint (eslint), test (vitest run), build (next build) + Prettier (eslint-config-prettier, scoped .prettierignore). Tailwind @theme in app/globals.css seeded with DESIGN.md color/radius/font tokens; placeholder page renders the canvas. ./init.sh green from clean checkout: typecheck=0, lint=0, vitest 1/1 pass, next build OK; prod server renders GEKKO page.

features.name: Profile export parser + tests
features.description: lib/engine/parseProfile.ts: parse the Markdown VbP/Delta exports (Metadata tickSize/binSize, Summary POC/VAH/VAL, fenced csv, descending prices; distinguish files by 2nd column Volume vs Delta), join on Price into {price,volume,delta}. Unit tests assert against chart-data/vbp_export.md and chart-data/delta_vbp_export.md.
features.evidence: lib/engine/parseProfile.ts: pure TS parser with extractMeta/extractSummary/extractCsvBlock/detectType/validateSpacing/parseCsvRows internals; public parseProfiles(vbpContent, deltaContent) left-joins on VbP price series → ProfileRow[]{price,volume,delta|null}; parseProfilesFromFiles convenience wrapper. lib/engine/parseProfile.test.ts: 7 tests against chart-data/vbp_export.md + chart-data/delta_vbp_export.md (metadata, row counts, ordering, spot-check overlap price 30258.75 volume=19 delta=13, spot-check null delta at 30218.75, wrong-arg-order throw). ./init.sh green: typecheck/lint/test(8 pass)/build all pass.

features.name: Sierra Chart chart-image auto-export PoC
features.description: Prove Sierra Chart auto-dumps clean, consistently-cropped HTF/TPO/exec PNGs on a timer to C:\gekko\export\. Document the study/config and capture sample outputs.

features.name: Execution bars CSV parser + tests
features.description: lib/engine/parseExecBars.ts: parse chart-data/execution_bar_data.rolling.csv (header DateTime,Open,High,Low,Close,LegVWAP,DeltaIntensity; ~250 ascending-time rows) into typed ExecBar[] {dateTime:Date, open, high, low, close, legVWAP, deltaIntensity}; tolerate zero LegVWAP (pre-leg) rows; validate the header/column order and throw on mismatch. Unit tests assert against the fixture (row count, first/last-row spot-checks, ascending-time ordering, header-mismatch throw).
features.evidence: lib/engine/parseExecBars.ts: pure TS parser for chart-data/execution_bar_data.rolling.csv (250 rows, DateTime,Open,High,Low,Close,LegVWAP,DeltaIntensity). Validates header column order, throws on mismatch, tolerates zero LegVWAP (pre-leg rows), parses DateTime→Date + 6 numeric columns → ExecBar[]. lib/engine/parseExecBars.test.ts: 6 tests (row count 250, first/last spot-checks, ascending-time ordering, pre-leg tolerance, header-mismatch throw). ./init.sh green: typecheck/lint/test(14 pass)/build all pass.

features.name: Supabase schema, migrations & storage
features.description: Supabase project; migrations for config, raw_bundles, briefings, entry_levels, eval_results; Storage buckets for PNGs/CSVs. Seed a config row (model_id, triage_model_id='anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5', rr_min=3.0). eval_results(id, bundle_id fk, created_at, model_id, near_entry bool, status text [ENTER|WAIT|NOT_VALID|NO_ENTRY_NEAR], evaluated_level_id fk null, direction text null, trigger text null, stop numeric null, targets numeric[] null, reason text, raw_model_json jsonb, current_price numeric). No latest_price table (current price comes from the latest bundle).
features.evidence: supabase/ scaffolded via `supabase init`. 3 timestamped migrations: init_core_schema (config singleton id=1 default 1; raw_bundles; briefings; entry_levels with direction long/short check; eval_results with status check ENTER|WAIT|NOT_VALID|NO_ENTRY_NEAR + near_entry/evaluated_level_id fk/direction/trigger/stop/targets/reason/raw_model_json/current_price — no latest_price table; indexes on received_at/created_at/active/fks; RLS enabled on all 5 tables, no policies = service-role-only), storage_buckets (private chart-images + bundle-csvs), seed_config (singleton row anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6 + triage anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5 + rr_min 3.0, idempotent). Applied LIVE to project qvhkqilizwozikpomxob via Supabase MCP: verified 5 tables, 2 buckets, 1 config row with documented defaults, RLS on all 5; get_advisors(security) returns only 5 INFO rls_enabled_no_policy notices (intentional). tests/migrations.test.ts: 15 offline guards over the SQL. ./init.sh green: typecheck/lint/test(29 pass, 4 files)/build all pass.

features.name: Briefing + EvalResult output contracts (Zod)
features.description: knowledge/schema/briefing.schema.ts: Zod Briefing + Objective per the Output contract (meta, overview, terrain.zones/levels, primary/secondary, dangerZones) as the source of truth for analyze-task output. Also EvalResult { meta:{createdAt,currentPrice,nearEntry,zone?}, status:'ENTER'|'WAIT'|'NOT_VALID'|'NO_ENTRY_NEAR', evaluatedLevel?:{label,price,direction}, direction?, trigger?, stop?, targets?, reason } for the eval-task output.
features.evidence: knowledge/schema/briefing.schema.ts: Zod (v4.4.3) output contracts mirroring the docs/agent-architecture-plan.md Output contract. Briefing{meta(createdAt,triggerReason,currentPrice,htfTrend,ripStatus), overview(currentPosition[],structuralArchitecture[],orderFlowContext[],keyInflections{level,why}[]), terrain(zones{color,top,bottom,label}[], levels{price,label,kind:trench|wall|magnet|mgi}[]), primary/secondary:Objective, dangerZones{area,why}[]}; Objective{macroGoal,rationale,direction:long|short, entries{label,price,trigger}[], stops{label,price,invalidation}[], targets{label:T1|T2|T3,price,description}[], rr}; EvalResult{meta{createdAt,currentPrice,nearEntry,zone?}, status:ENTER|WAIT|NOT_VALID|NO_ENTRY_NEAR, evaluatedLevel?{label,price,direction}, direction?,trigger?,stop?,targets?,reason}. Exports inferred TS types + standalone enums (Direction,LevelKind,TargetLabel,EvalStatus). tests/briefing.schema.test.ts: 16 tests (enum membership/rejection, full Briefing accept, missing-section/bad-kind/non-numeric-price reject, unknown-key strip, Objective rr/target-label, EvalResult full ENTER + minimal NO_ENTRY_NEAR + nearEntry-boolean/status/reason guards). vitest.config.ts: added '@' path alias + knowledge/**/*.test.ts glob. ./init.sh green: typecheck/lint/test(45 pass, 5 files)/build all pass.

features.name: AI SDK + OpenRouter provider wiring
features.description: Vercel AI SDK configured with OpenRouter as the gateway; model id read from config (anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6 default). Thin wrapper exposing generateObject with image parts. Assert response.model matches the configured model.
features.evidence: lib/llm/ wraps Vercel AI SDK generateObject over OpenRouter (@openrouter/ai-sdk-provider). getOpenRouter() reads OPENROUTER_API_KEY (throws if unset); generateStructured() defaults model to anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6 (caller passes config.model_id), attaches base64 chart images as vision parts, asserts response.response.modelId matches the requested model, and re-validates output against the Zod schema. 9 unit tests (tests/llm.generateStructured.test.ts) cover match/mismatch, default model, image parts, schema rejection, and missing-key. .env.example added. ./init.sh green: typecheck clean, 54 tests pass, build OK.

features.name: /api/ingest endpoint
features.description: Multipart ingest: store PNGs/CSVs to Storage, mgi JSON to jsonb, write raw_bundles row, enqueue analyze-task. Bearer-auth the route.

features.name: Local uploader (chokidar)
features.description: Node watcher on the Windows export folder: debounce file writes, bundle the set, POST multipart to /api/ingest with bearer auth + retry/backoff. ~100 lines isolating all fragile local concerns.

features.name: trigger.dev project setup
features.description: Install/configure trigger.dev in the repo (project ref, env, deploy); a hello task runs locally and on deploy. Use the trigger.dev MCP/skills for the current API.

features.name: deltaTelemetry.ts
features.description: Reduce the parsed ExecBar[] (from parseExecBars, the ~250-row exec CSV) to a compact summary (recent delta trend, sign, +/-3/+/-4 extremes, Leg-VWAP-relative position) for the prompt.

features.name: mgiPriority.ts
features.description: MGI Tier 1/2/3 hierarchy + daily priority sort; compute nearest Tier-1 border above/below current price.

features.name: ripStatus.ts
features.description: Vanguard Protocol Green/Yellow/Red from price-vs-Rip + DeltaIntensity.

features.name: lvnDetection.ts
features.description: HVN peaks + low-volume-node valleys from the VbP volume series (local-minima/gradient detection, neighborhood-thresholded). Validated against a hand-labeled chart.

features.name: magnetCheck.ts
features.description: Trench/Wall/Magnet detection: magnets = POC/VAH/VAL (from Summary) + HVN peaks; magnet proximity = |price - magnet|; cross-reference MGI levels.

features.name: terrainZones.ts
features.description: Contiguous Stratosphere->Abyss zone stack with the No-Gap invariant (Price[N]===Price2[N+1]); classify regions by volume (acceptance/HVN vs rejection/LVN) cross-referenced with delta sign (absorption vs initiative). Engine assembles + validates borders.

features.name: riskReward.ts
features.description: Direction-aware 3:1 R/R gate; enforce 'stops never widen' vs the prior briefing. Produces rr for each Objective.

features.name: analyze-task (engine-integrated)
features.description: trigger.dev task: load bundle -> run the engine (deltaTelemetry/mgiPriority/ripStatus/lvnDetection/magnetCheck/terrainZones/riskReward) to compute facts and validate terrain borders -> AI SDK generateObject via OpenRouter (chart images + engine facts + raw mgi, Briefing schema; model supplies perception/judgment only) -> Zod validate -> persist briefing + entry_levels. Includes the hybrid LVN flow (engine proposes LVN/border candidates -> model confirms/adjusts against the chart image -> engine re-validates final borders). Retries; logs model/cost to run metadata.

features.name: Briefing + terrain render page
features.description: Next.js page that fetches the latest briefing and renders the full briefing (overview, primary/secondary objectives, danger zones, key inflections) plus terrain.zones[] as a real SVG/canvas zone map with a levels overlay; renders the latest EvalResult (status + direction/trigger/stop/targets/reason). Hosts the 'Run Briefing' and 'Check Entry at Current Price' trigger buttons. Parity check vs the existing sample briefing.

features.name: Manual briefing trigger (button + route)
features.description: On-demand full briefing: a 'Run Briefing' button in the Next.js UI calls POST /api/briefings/run, which does tasks.trigger('analyze-task', { triggerReason: 'manual' }). No cron / schedules.task / interval_min.

features.name: Vercel deployment
features.description: Deploy Next.js to Vercel; wire env/secrets (Supabase, OpenRouter, trigger.dev, ingest bearer). Use the Vercel plugin for current config. End-to-end: drop bundle -> briefing row -> page renders.

features.name: Knowledge restructure
features.description: Dedupe instructions.md + tactical-companion-playbook.md into /knowledge: system (persona, constraints, output-schema), doctrine (patterns, chart-reading, glossary), schema (briefing.schema.ts). Computable doctrine removed from prose.

features.name: Prompt caching
features.description: Assemble static doctrine into a cached prefix via the AI SDK Anthropic provider cache_control/providerOptions (through OpenRouter); volatile data after the prefix. Use the default 5-min cache TTL (runs are on-demand, no fixed interval). Assert usage.cache_read_input_tokens > 0 on repeat runs.

features.name: entry_levels lifecycle
features.description: On each new briefing, set prior entry_levels.active=false and insert the new set; the eval-task evaluates active=true levels only.

features.name: Eval task + 'Check Entry' button
features.description: On-demand entry check: a 'Check Entry at Current Price' button calls POST /api/eval/run, which does tasks.trigger('eval-task'). eval-task loads the latest bundle (current price = raw_bundles.current_price) + active entry_levels, calls the AI SDK generateObject with the EvalResult schema using the triage model (config.triage_model_id, default anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5) with chart images + delta telemetry, implements the instructions.md eval logic (ENTER/WAIT/NOT_VALID per long/short conditions, else NO_ENTRY_NEAR), persists an eval_results row, triggers notify.

features.name: Web notifications
features.description: Notification API + Service Worker driven by Supabase Realtime on briefings/eval_results; fires on a new briefing or a new eval result while the tab is open/backgrounded.

features.name: Web Push (tab-closed)
features.description: VAPID + web-push for alerts when the tab is fully closed; opt-in subscription flow.

features.name: Config UI
features.description: Settings page to edit config (model_id, triage_model_id, rr_min) with validation; writes the config row.

features.name: Staleness detection
features.description: At button-press time (briefing or eval), check bundle freshness: if the latest bundle is older than a margin, surface a staleness warning and mark the result stale; UI marks briefings/eval results stale; never serve stale as fresh.

features.name: Cost/latency observability
features.description: Persist model/cost/latency + cache-hit metrics per run; dashboard or log surface; assert prompt-cache hits on repeat runs. Wire AI SDK experimental_telemetry (recordInputs/recordOutputs) to LangSmith via its OTLP/OpenTelemetry ingestion endpoint so the exact prompt sent and model response are viewable per run (nested inside the trigger.dev run trace). Strip/exclude the base64 chart-image parts from recorded inputs so traces capture the doctrine prompt + JSON response without PNG bloat.

features.name: Opus high-conviction review flag
features.description: Config flag to route high-conviction reviews to anthropic/claude-opus-4-8 for max fidelity.

features.name: Doctrine drift guard
features.description: Keep constraints.md guardrails and engine code in sync (engine authoritative); a check/test that flags divergence of non-negotiables.
